title: poa nemoralis subsp. interior
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. interior, also known as the prairie grass or interior bluegrass, is a subspecies of the Poa nemoralis species, a type of grass native to North America. The medicinal properties of Poa nemoralis subsp. interior include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support digestive well-being. Poa nemoralis subsp. interior can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
